data.content: Implementation complete. Branch: worktree-foolery-53fe-agent-runtime (pushed to origin). Commit: d7022e0a. Added central agentRuntime settings (Codex speed fast + reasoning high → service_tier/model_reasoning_effort; Claude reasoning high → --effort, no speed). Real zod schema defaults; attached onto dispatch targets at all 4 chokepoints (take loop, orchestration, scope refinement, stale grooming); flags emitted in both interactive and prompt-mode adapter paths; per-sub-object merge isolates codex/claude. Labels/identity unchanged. Updated schema/types, settings merge+partial, settings UI, OpenAPI mirror, docs/SETTINGS.md. Tests added (adapter/helper/schema/merge/dispatch). Quality gates all pass: lint, tsc, test:all (293 files), build. Self-reviewed via adversarial multi-agent workflow; 2 nits fixed (OpenAPI mirror + comment accuracy).
